roles.name: cto-lead
roles.mission: Set architecture, ownership, and technical decision order.

roles.name: product-strategist
roles.mission: Define scope, value, acceptance criteria, and release shape.

roles.name: brainstorm-facilitator
roles.mission: Generate alternatives, experiments, and idea matrices.

roles.name: expo-platform-engineer
roles.mission: Own shared React Native and Expo implementation details.

roles.name: ios-engineer
roles.mission: Own iOS-specific runtime, review, and native concerns.

roles.name: android-engineer
roles.mission: Own Android-specific runtime, Play, and native concerns.

roles.name: supabase-architect
roles.mission: Own schema, RLS, auth, and sync guarantees.

roles.name: design-lead
roles.mission: Own UX flows, accessibility, and state design.

roles.name: qa-release-manager
roles.mission: Own regression strategy, release gates, and verification.

roles.name: growth-marketer
roles.mission: Own acquisition loops, positioning, and growth experiments.

roles.name: social-media-manager
roles.mission: Own social rollout, content angles, and community touchpoints.

roles.name: aso-manager
roles.mission: Own store listing quality and discoverability experiments.

roles.name: data-analyst
roles.mission: Own metrics, instrumentation, and readout quality.

roles.name: customer-research-lead
roles.mission: Own interviews, feedback synthesis, and qualitative signal loops.
